subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hath hearkened unto the Call when it was raised from the Most Exalted Horizon, that perchance this remembrance may draw him unto a station wherefrom none can hold him back [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع الندآء اذ ارتفع من الافق الاعلی لیجذبه الذکر الی مقام لا تمنعه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
